plugins.name: dogfu
plugins.description: Sales toolkit powered by the dogfu CLI: lead-research (Discover → Qualify → Enrich → CRM), lead-touch (cold outreach cadence in Close), lead-engage (work live deals — opportunities — from first engagement to close), lead-worklist (read-only cross-phase worklist — the prioritized leads to work now, across all stages, with context), crm-cleanup (read-only audit of the CRM for leads/tasks that fell out of the flow), first-audit (publish a first-touch outside-in SEO/AEO prospect audit and record it on the lead), narrative-audit (a standalone brand category & narrative-coherence check on a domain), and berlin-theme (Berlin's brand style guide for on-brand sales collateral).
